summary: A Go-based orchestration framework utilizing AI agents to generate tests and integrate MCP, currently experiencing repository bloat from automated session metadata.
concerns: High volume of auto-generated/archived agent sessions cluttering the repository
Potential test fragmentation across numerous isolated agent directories
Heavy reliance on metadata chore commits
suggestions: Implement .gitignore rules or a dedicated archive repository for GOrchestra session metadata
Consolidate overlapping extra tests from isolated agent branches into the main test suites
Focus core development on the MCP handlers and runner logic rather than peripheral test generation
